For the avoidance of doubt, no MAC/MAE closing condition applies to the Tranche B disbursement of the Bridge Facility.

STRICTLY PRIVATE & CONFIDENTIAL — NOT FOR RELEASE — EMBARGOED UNTIL 14 Aug 2026 08:00 MYT — Project Nangka.
Term Sheet: Proposed acquisition of 62.5% equity in Tanjung Seroja Marine Sdn Bhd by Jati Perdana Holdings Berhad (Main Market issuer, Bursa Malaysia Securities).
Parties: Buyer — Jati Perdana Holdings Berhad; Seller — Kencana Lapis Resources Sdn Bhd (Rep: Encik Faris Nazim, faris.nazim@kencana-lapis.example.my).
Company contact: Puan Nor Aishah Aziz, CFO, ir@jati-perdana.example.com.my; meeting venue: Menara Hijau, Level 28, 19 Jalan Sunting 3, 50450 Kuala Lumpur.
Consideration: MYR 180,000,000 cash + MYR 20,000,000 Vendor Loan Note; 10% deposit to escrow with Amanah Kencana Trustees (M) Sdn Bhd (Escrow Ref: AKT-XX88-4-90).
Conditions precedent: approvals under Paragraph 10.06 of the MMLR and Sections 188/317 CMSA compliance; shareholders’ approval; BNM FEA confirmation; customary MAC/MAE for Target business.
For the avoidance of doubt, no MAC/MAE closing condition applies to the Tranche B disbursement of the Bridge Facility.
Financing: Bridge Facility of MYR 120,000,000 at 5.45% p.a. from Melur Capital Bank Berhad secured by share charge; negative pledge and DSCR ≥ 1.5x.
Definitive Agreements: Share Sale Agreement, Shareholders’ Agreement, and Financing Agreements to be executed by 30 Sep 2026; Long-Stop Date: 31 Oct 2026; termination fee 2.0%.
Analyst preview (internal only): pro forma FY2027 EPS accretion ~12% and net gearing falls to 0.9x post-issue; preliminary synergy est. MYR 14–18m p.a.
